description_long: This is a large, cylindrical trash bin with a flared rim and vertical ribbing along its body, giving it a reinforced and sturdy appearance. The bin is predominantly dark green, with a slightly glossy finish that suggests it is made of durable plastic. The top opening is wide and unobstructed, allowing for easy disposal of waste, and the interior appears hollow. There are no visible handles, wheels, or lid mechanisms, indicating a simple, open-top design. The exterior features subtle banding and panel details, enhancing its structural integrity and visual appeal. There are no visible labels, signage, or recycling symbols on the surface.
description: A large, dark green, open-top cylindrical trash bin with a flared rim and vertical ribbing, made of sturdy plastic and lacking handles, wheels, or visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared rim and vertical ribbing, with no handles or signage visible.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the cylindrical shape and ribbed texture.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to the others, with the same flared rim and ribbing details.
description_view_3: Rear view, indistinguishable from the front and sides, showing the same open top and ribbed body.
